v2_merge_note: v2 branch merged into main. Main is now the active development branch. v1 branch continues for hotfixes only. v2 and v1 code coexist on main during cleanup phase.

sprint_velocity_30d.note: Extremely high velocity week: v2 chat-page carve series (15+ PRs by DeJeune) landed 2026-06-19 to 2026-06-22.
